title: melilotus graecus
intro: Melilotus graecus, also known as yellow melilot, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Melilotus graecus include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
